#pragma clang diagnostic pop

NS_ASSUME_NONNULL_BEGIN

#ifndef ProtobufProtobuf
#define ProtobufProtobuf J2ktProtobufProtobuf
#endif  // !defined(ProtobufProtobuf)

NS_INLINE J2ktProtobufProtobuf* create_ProtobufProtobuf_init(void) {
 return [[J2ktProtobufProtobuf alloc] init];
}

NS_INLINE J2ktProtobufProtobuf* new_ProtobufProtobuf_init(void) {
 return [[J2ktProtobufProtobuf alloc] init];
}

#ifndef ProtobufProtobuf_Test
#define ProtobufProtobuf_Test J2ktProtobufProtobuf_Test
#endif  // !defined(ProtobufProtobuf_Test)

#ifndef ProtobufProtobuf_TestCompanion
#define ProtobufProtobuf_TestCompanion J2ktProtobufProtobuf_TestCompanion
#endif  // !defined(ProtobufProtobuf_TestCompanion)

}

}
